title: origanum pampaninii
intro: Origanum pampaninii, also known as Nepalese marjoram, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Origanum pampaninii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Origanum pampaninii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
